summary: Comprehensive i18n testing completed successfully. All translation files for French (fr) and Spanish (es) are working correctly. Language switching fully functional on landing page.

resolved_bugs.issue: Only supported PT and EN languages initially
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Updated component to support all 4 languages (pt, en, fr, es) with proper flag imports

passed_tests: All 18 translation files exist for French (fr) with correct JSON structure
All 18 translation files exist for Spanish (es) with correct JSON structure
i18n.js registers all 17 namespaces correctly for fr and es
Next.js app builds and runs successfully with new translations
Landing page loads correctly at pod URL
Language selector displays all 4 languages (PT, EN, FR, ES)
French language switching works - verified French text appears
Spanish language switching works - verified Spanish text appears
Translation key completeness verified - fr and es have all keys from en
Sample translations quality verified - proper French/Spanish translations, not just copies
